# Basquio

> Basquio turns structured data files into finished analysis decks. Upload CSV, Excel, or spreadsheet data and get back an editable PPTX with real charts, a narrative report, and a traceable data workbook — all from one automated run. The only tool that bridges data analysis (Tableau, Power BI) and presentation design (Gamma, Beautiful.ai) in one workflow.

Basquio was built by market research analysts and brand managers who spent years building category review decks manually. It reads data files, computes metrics with code (pandas, numpy — not AI hallucination), generates real charts (matplotlib + PptxGenJS), writes audience-aware narratives, and delivers branded output.

## Pricing

- **Free**: $0, 30 one-time credits (~2 Deck runs). Basquio branding on output. No credit card.
- **Starter**: $19/month ($190/year). 30 credits/month, no branding, 2 custom template slots.
- **Pro**: $149/month ($1,490/year). 200 credits/month, no branding, 5 custom template slots, priority queue.
- **Enterprise**: Custom billing, shared workspace, dedicated support.

Credit model: Memo = 3 flat. Deck = 3 + 1/slide (first 10) + 2/slide (11+). Deep-Dive = 5 + 2/slide. Credit packs: $0.88/cr (Free), $0.70/cr (Starter), $0.50/cr (Pro).

## Product

- [Homepage](https://basquio.com): Product overview, workflow demo, pricing snapshot
- [How It Works](https://basquio.com/how-it-works): Four-stage workflow from data upload to finished deck
- [Compare](https://basquio.com/compare): Feature comparison vs ChatGPT/Claude, Gamma/Beautiful.ai, Tableau/Power BI, think-cell
- [Pricing](https://basquio.com/pricing): Full pricing with credit logic, pack pricing, and plan comparison
- [The PowerPoint Tax Calculator](https://basquio.com/powerpoint-tax): Calculate how much time and money your team loses to manual deck production. The average analyst gives up about 14 work weeks a year.
- [Output Library](https://basquio.com/library): Download real PPTX decks generated by Basquio — healthcare analysis, executive summaries, marketplace deep dives
- [Trust](https://basquio.com/trust): Data handling — encryption, no AI training, temporary containers, SOC2 inheritance

## Blog

- [The Complete Guide to Data-to-Presentation Tools in 2026](https://basquio.com/blog/complete-guide-data-to-presentation-tools-2026): Category guide comparing all approaches from manual PowerPoint to AI-native tools
- [Basquio vs Gamma: Data Analysis vs Slide Design](https://basquio.com/blog/basquio-vs-gamma-data-analysis-vs-slide-design): When to use each — data files vs text prompts
- [Automate Category Review Decks from Syndicated Data](https://basquio.com/blog/automate-category-review-decks-syndicated-data): CPG workflow automation guide
- [Basquio vs Beautiful.ai for Data Teams](https://basquio.com/blog/basquio-vs-beautiful-ai-for-data-teams): Which tool fits data-driven workflows
- [AI for Consultants: Data Analysis to Client Decks](https://basquio.com/blog/ai-for-consultants-data-analysis-to-client-decks): How consulting firms automate data-heavy reporting
- [How to Turn Excel Data into Presentation Slides Automatically](https://basquio.com/blog/how-to-turn-excel-data-into-presentation-slides-automatically): All 6 approaches compared from manual to AI-native
- [Basquio vs think-cell: Full Deck Generation vs Chart Formatting](https://basquio.com/blog/basquio-vs-think-cell-data-to-deck-vs-chart-formatting): Consulting-grade chart tools compared

## Use Cases

- [For Brand Managers](https://basquio.com/for/brand-managers): Turn syndicated data trackers into leadership-ready category stories
- [For Consultants](https://basquio.com/for/consultants): Compress analysis and deck-building into one report flow
- [For Strategy Teams](https://basquio.com/for/strategy-teams): Evidence package to decision-ready storyline
- [For Agencies](https://basquio.com/for/agencies): Scale recurring client reporting without flattening the brand

- [About](https://basquio.com/about): Team background — market research analysts, brand managers, and one engineer
- [Trust](https://basquio.com/trust): Data security, encryption, no AI training, temporary processing containers
